test.command: cargo test -p swell-llm && cargo test -p swell-daemon
test.notes: swell-llm: 20 tests passed, swell-daemon: 62 tests passed

blockingIssues.description: GLOBAL_COST_TRACKER is never updated by LLM backends - sync_cost_from_global() has no effect
blockingIssues.detail: DashboardState::sync_cost_from_global() polls GLOBAL_COST_TRACKER, but no LLM backend calls record_llm_cost(). The /api/cost endpoint will always return zero after any LLM activity.

blockingIssues.description: DashboardState::register_agent is never called - no path from orchestrator to dashboard agent registry
blockingIssues.detail: Orchestrator::register_agent() emits OrchestratorEvent::AgentRegistered but this event type is not handled anywhere. There's no conversion to DashboardState::register_agent() in the runtime path. The /api/agents endpoint will always return empty list.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that event wiring between components must be verified through integration tests that exercise the full runtime path. The broadcast channel for events is correct, but the DaemonEvent to DashboardState bridge is incomplete - AgentRegistered events from the orchestrator never reach the dashboard.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature observability-dashboard-api-integration-fix added runtime wiring for broadcast_event (fixed) and sync_cost_from_global (partially fixed - polling exists but GLOBAL_COST_TRACKER is never updated by LLM backends). Agent registration is still completely unwired.
